channel.title: Journal für die reine und angewandte Mathematik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal für die reine und angewandte Mathematik

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Bruno Kahn, Cyril Demarche DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2025-frontmatter819

item.title: Klein–Maskit combination theorem for Anosov subgroups: Amalgams

item.title: Symmetries of Fano varieties
item.description: Article by Bruno Kahn, Cyril Demarche DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0077

item.title: Parallel transport on non-collapsed 𝖱𝖢𝖣(𝐾, 𝑁) spaces
item.description: Article by Bruno Kahn, Cyril Demarche DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0082

item.title: A Schmidt–Nochka theorem for closed subschemes in subgeneral position
item.description: Article by Bruno Kahn, Cyril Demarche DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0085

item.title: Boundary Hölder continuity of stable solutions to semilinear elliptic problems in 𝐶1,1 domains
item.description: Article by Bruno Kahn, Cyril Demarche DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0084

item.title: Kawamata–Miyaoka type inequality for ℚ-Fano varieties with canonical singularities
item.description: Article by Bruno Kahn, Cyril Demarche DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0087

item.title: Finite generation of fundamental groups for manifolds with nonnegative Ricci curvature whose universal cover is almost 𝑘-polar at infinity
item.description: Article by Bruno Kahn, Cyril Demarche DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0089

item.title: The fullness conjectures for products of elliptic curves
item.description: Article by Bruno Kahn, Cyril Demarche DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0088
